subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending word and utterance, befitteth and beseemeth the Sovereign of unfading majesty, Who hath revealed all sacred books and scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از لفظ و بیان سلطان بیزوالی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع کتب و صحف و زبر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
